programmes.show_description: Gritty crime drama with Danny Dyer. A criminal flees London in the 1980s and joins the inner circle of a British gangster living in exile on the Costa del Sol.
Western remake with Ron Perlman. An orphan is raised by a cattle baron and trained to uphold the law, but begins to realise that his mentor has taken him in to serve a hidden agenda.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A man accused of coming into court with unclean hands regarding a botched co-op deal is put in his place after talking back to Her Honor.
A young man sets off to Paris with his girlfriend only to allegedly beg mom for money once he gets there; she sues him for payback.
When a young man exhibits allegedly poor restaurant manners, an outraged father takes justice into his own hands.
Bricks are thrown and assault charges are filed when two women fight over the same unemployed man; the Judge sets them straight.
A woman sues her former hairdresser for an unpaid loan to hire a divorce attorney; she claims she was paying off the loan by styling her hair for free.
An alleged threat to report a dirt bike as stolen leads to a woman returning the bike to its owner despite being on time in her payments; she sues him for the return of payments she made.
A woman is suing her sister for damages to an SUV that was in her name; her sister says she repossessed the vehicle two years ago.
While serving in Iraq, a man meets a woman on Facebook whom he begins dating when he returns home. Both single parents, they end up fighting in court over money.
A man comes to the rescue of his disabled mother while her daughter allegedly reneges on payback of a loan for her and her four children.

Couty Alexander calls police saying that he found his wife, Christa, shot. However, a gap in his story proves he is the one that pulled the trigger.
When Sheila Bellush is discovered dead, police learn of a tumultuous custody battle with her ex-husband, Allen Blackthorn. But is his alibi water-tight?
Was an Atlanta detective's investigation into an alleged rape and shooting death case influenced by TV cameras? Erin Moriarty investigates.
A serial killer indicated he would kill twelve people, one for each astrological sign. Investigators got profile of the killer, and a stroke of luck enabled them to find him.
A healthy man dies mysteriously in his sleep. Toxicology reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note, but determine he didn't kill himself.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A Satanic symbol found at crime scenes suggests abducted children are going to be sacrificed...
Thriller with Denzel Washington. A CIA agent sent to question a rogue operative arrested for betraying the agency has to protect the prisoner from mercenaries - and resist his mind games.
Action adventure with Jean-Claude Van Damme. When a mission goes wrong, a CIA agent is forced to team up with a flamboyant arms dealer to protect his pregnant wife from a violent terrorist.
A tough detective (Dean Cain) will stop at nothing for vengeance after the murder of his wife.
Action-packed thriller with Bruce Willis. After a botched heist leaves her crime lord boss unhappy, a thief persuades her former lover to help her steal a shipment of rare and valuable gems.

A landscaper is accused of vandalizing a woman's yard after a dispute over finances.
A woman sues her teenage daughter and her boyfriend for allegedly totalling a car she was allowing her to borrow.
A woman sues her estranged son-in-law for money he received for housing while out of the country; she believes it should go to his wife and child.
A teenager's car is allegedly beaten with a bat when he admits to going out of his way to meet up with friends arguing over a girl.
When a man feels stiffed after a car deal, he is accused of taking out his frustration on a tenant by illegally evicting him.
A vehicle takes a severe 'knifing' when a woman vandalises her baby daddy's ex-girlfriend's vehicle.
The Judge cites a study naming the top 'biting' dogs, as she mediates a case involving the mauling death of a Terrier by a Pit Bull mix.
A woman sues her former hairdresser for an unpaid loan to hire a divorce attorney; she claims she was paying off the loan by styling her hair for free.
An alleged threat to report a dirt bike as stolen leads to a woman returning the bike to its owner despite being on time in her payments; she sues him for the return of payments she made.

A Brooklyn woman turns to a N.Y. private eye for help tracking down a Russian beauty she believes robbed and killed her mother. Can they find her? Peter Van Sant investigates.
Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with stolen cash.
Bryan Whitelock killed a friend and his brother, later murdered his neighbour Wendy Buckney, and was sentenced to life with no parole.
In the US, Dr Milner's obsession led to the stalking of Tanya and Kenny. After court orders failed, he murdered Kenny and was sentenced to life in prison.

An astronaut stranded on a distant planet with no hope for rescue learns that a devastating nuclear war has killed his people back home.
Three National Guardsmen on manoeuvres near the site of the Battle of Little Big Horn are surprised to hear the sound of Indian war cries.
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills.
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A Russian detective and a Chicago cop put aside their mutual mistrust to catch an escaped Soviet drug baron and bring him to justice.
